data.title: U.S. Defense Secretary Hegseth: We Negotiate with Ammunition
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has emphasized the strategic importance of military readiness in diplomatic negotiations. According to Jin10, Hegseth stated that the United States leverages its ammunition and military capabilities as a key component in discussions with other nations. This approach underscores the country's commitment to maintaining a strong defense posture while engaging in international diplomacy. Hegseth's remarks highlight the ongoing balance between military preparedness and diplomatic efforts in U.S. foreign policy.

data.title: Russian Citizen Sentenced for Role in Ransomware Attacks
data.description: A U.S. court has sentenced Russian citizen Aleksei Volkov to 81 months in prison for his involvement in aiding ransomware groups, resulting in over $9 million in losses across the United States. According to NS3.AI, Volkov pleaded guilty to six charges across two indictments and acknowledged receiving a portion of the cryptocurrency ransom payments. Additionally, the court mandated nearly $9.2 million in restitution to identified victims and the forfeiture of equipment used in the criminal activities.

data.title: BMO Enables 24/7 Tokenized Cash Settlement via CME and Google Cloud
data.description: BMO has announced that its clients can now convert dollars into tokenized cash and deposits on CME and Google Cloud's Universal Ledger. According to NS3.AI, this integration allows for 24/7 settlement of margin, collateral, and B2B payments, extending institutional access to tokenized settlement beyond traditional trading hours. BMO has described this rollout as a significant milestone in the adoption of institutional tokenization infrastructure.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Apple Tests Standalone Siri App Amid AI Overhaul
data.description: Apple is reportedly testing a standalone application for its Siri voice assistant, as part of a comprehensive artificial intelligence update. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the tech giant is also developing a new feature called “Ask Siri,” which is designed to function seamlessly across its software ecosystem. This move is seen as part of Apple's broader strategy to enhance its AI capabilities and improve user interaction with its devices. The standalone app and the new feature are expected to provide users with more flexibility and improved functionality when using Siri. Apple's efforts reflect the growing emphasis on AI technology within the tech industry, as companies strive to offer more intuitive and efficient digital assistants.

data.title: Lombard partners with Bitwise to activate $500 billion in institutionally held BTC for yield and collateralized lending.
data.description: Lombard and Bitwise Asset Management announced a collaboration at the Digital Asset Summit in New York, offering institutions a solution for earning yield and collateralized BTC lending without removing assets from custody, targeting the scale of BTC assets held in institutional custody. Bitwise will develop yield strategies combining DeFi lending with tokenized real-world assets, while the decentralized lending protocol Morpho will provide the infrastructure for BTC-collateralized lending. The platform uses Bitcoin-native tools such as partially signed transactions and time locks to verify collateral, allowing positions to be represented on-chain without transferring or re-collateralizing the underlying assets. Phillips stated that Bitcoin Smart Accounts can simultaneously reduce custody, cross-chain bridge, and counterparty risks. Targeting high-net-worth individuals, asset management firms, and corporate treasuries, the solution is planned for launch in the second quarter of 2026, with plans to add more custodians and protocols to expand coverage. Lombard estimates that approximately $500 billion worth of BTC is held in institutional custody; DefiLlama data shows that the total value locked in BTC in DeFi is approximately $2.93 billion, with a market capitalization of approximately $1.4 trillion; as of press time, Babylon Protocol's total value locked is approximately $2.8 billion, and Lombard's is approximately $744 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: U.S. President Trump Highlights Progress in Iran Negotiations
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the United States is making significant progress in its dealings with Iran. According to NS3.AI, Trump emphasized that discussions are ongoing with the appropriate parties to secure a favorable agreement.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Lawmakers Near Agreement on Government Shutdown
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that legislators are close to reaching a consensus on the government shutdown issue. According to Jin10, Trump expressed optimism about the ongoing negotiations, suggesting that a resolution may be imminent. The government shutdown has been a significant concern, affecting various sectors and prompting urgent discussions among lawmakers. Trump’s statement indicates progress in the talks, potentially averting further disruptions. The shutdown has been a focal point in political debates, with both parties striving to find common ground to restore normal government operations.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Regime Change in Iran Possible
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed his views on Iran, suggesting that a regime change could be underway. According to Jin10, Trump indicated that the current situation might lead to significant political shifts within the country. His comments come amid ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran, highlighting the potential for transformative developments in the region. The implications of such a change could have far-reaching effects on geopolitical dynamics and international relations.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Iran's 'Gift' Involves Oil and Gas Related to Strait of Hormuz
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has described a recent development involving Iran as a 'very big gift' with significant monetary value. According to Jin10, Trump indicated that this 'gift' is related to oil and gas and involves the strategic Strait of Hormuz. The Strait is a crucial passage for global oil shipments, and any developments in this area could have substantial implications for international energy markets. Trump's remarks highlight the ongoing geopolitical tensions and their potential impact on global oil supply routes.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump to Review Potential Senate Agreement on Government Shutdown
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that he will examine a potential agreement reached by the Senate concerning the government shutdown issue. According to Jin10, this development comes amid ongoing discussions aimed at resolving the budget impasse that has led to a partial shutdown of government operations. The President's statement indicates a willingness to consider legislative solutions proposed by the Senate to address the situation. Further details on the agreement and its implications for government operations are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Secretary of State Rubio and Vice President Vance Engaged in Talks with Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that Secretary of State Rubio, Vice President Vance, and other officials are currently engaged in negotiations with Iran. According to Jin10, these discussions are part of ongoing diplomatic efforts to address various issues between the two nations. The talks aim to find common ground and potentially ease tensions that have been prevalent in recent times. Further details on the progress or outcomes of these negotiations have not been disclosed.

data.title: India's Prime Minister Modi Discusses West Asia Situation with Sri Lankan President
data.description: India's Prime Minister Narendra Modi has engaged in discussions with Sri Lankan President regarding the situation in West Asia. According to Jin10, the talks emphasized the importance of maintaining open and secure shipping routes in the region. The dialogue reflects ongoing regional concerns about maritime security and the stability of crucial trade pathways.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Iran Agrees to Never Possess Nuclear Weapons
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that Iran has agreed to never acquire nuclear weapons. According to Jin10, this statement comes amid ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran over nuclear capabilities and regional security. The agreement, if upheld, could mark a significant step towards reducing nuclear proliferation in the Middle East. However, details of the agreement and its enforcement mechanisms remain unclear. The international community will be closely monitoring the situation to ensure compliance and stability in the region.

data.title: Polish Armed Forces on High Alert Due to Russian Drone Activity
data.description: On March 24, local time, the Polish Armed Forces Operational Command announced that due to Russian drone activity in western Ukraine, the air forces of Poland and its allies have initiated operations within Polish airspace. According to Jin10, fighter jets and helicopters have been deployed, and ground-based air defense systems are on high alert. The Polish Armed Forces Operational Command reported that Russian drones have launched a large-scale air assault on Ukraine, including attacks on the city center of Lviv. The Operational Command is continuously monitoring the situation, with forces and equipment ready to respond immediately.

data.title: Enbridge Considers New Oil Pipeline from Alberta to British Columbia
data.description: Enbridge is contemplating the construction of a new oil pipeline from Alberta to the British Columbia coast, according to the company's top executive. Bloomberg posted on X that the pipeline operator is open to the project if favorable regulatory conditions are met. This development comes amid ongoing discussions about energy infrastructure and environmental considerations in Canada. Enbridge's potential involvement in the project highlights the company's strategic interest in expanding its pipeline network, which could enhance oil transportation capabilities in the region. The decision will depend on regulatory approvals and environmental assessments, which are crucial factors in the planning and execution of such infrastructure projects.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Iran Lacks Leadership, Seeking Talks for Agreement
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran currently lacks a leader and that discussions are underway with appropriate individuals who are interested in reaching an agreement. According to Jin10, Trump emphasized the absence of leadership in Iran and expressed optimism about engaging with parties willing to negotiate. This development comes amid ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran, highlighting the potential for diplomatic efforts to address the situation.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Launches Post-Quantum Research Hub
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has unveiled a public post-quantum research hub, marking the culmination of an eight-year initiative that started in 2018. According to NS3.AI, this new resource outlines a phased migration plan across Ethereum's protocol layers. The Foundation anticipates that upgrades to Layer 1 could be finalized by 2029.

data.title: Houston Airport Warns of Extended Wait Times Amid TSA Checkpoint Closures
data.description: Passengers at George Bush Intercontinental Airport in Houston are facing potential wait times of over four hours due to the closure of several TSA checkpoints. Bloomberg posted on X that the airport has also suspended all PreCheck and CLEAR operations, leading to significant delays for travelers. The shutdowns have caused disruptions in passenger flow, prompting airport officials to advise travelers to plan accordingly and arrive early to accommodate the extended wait times. The situation underscores the importance of efficient security operations in maintaining smooth airport procedures.

data.title: Brazilian Court Allows Bolsonaro to Serve Sentence Under House Arrest
data.description: A Brazilian Supreme Court judge has decided that former President Jair Bolsonaro can serve his sentence for plotting a coup under house arrest. Bloomberg posted on X, citing local website UOL, that this decision permits Bolsonaro to leave prison due to concerns over his deteriorating health.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Introduces Prompt-Based Safety Strategy for Teen Protection
data.description: OpenAI has unveiled a new safety strategy aimed at assisting developers in creating age-appropriate protective measures for teenagers. According to Jin10, the initiative focuses on utilizing prompt-based techniques to enhance the safety and suitability of AI applications for younger users. This development is part of OpenAI's ongoing efforts to ensure that AI technologies are used responsibly and safely, particularly in contexts involving minors. The strategy is designed to guide developers in implementing safeguards that align with the needs and vulnerabilities of teenage users, promoting a safer digital environment.
